protocol_notes: Tried MOTS-c multiple times across five separate protocols: 1) 1mg ED for 8-12 weeks (useless); 2) 5mg 2x/week for 6-8 weeks (useless); 3) 5mg 3x/week for 6-8 weeks (useless); 4) 7mg 3x/week for 4 weeks (useless); 5) 10mg 2x/week for 2 weeks, then 10mg 3x/week for 1-2 weeks (useless). All dosed first thing in the morning.
